components.headline: Book service or plan your visit
components.body: The live site keeps practical next steps close on every page: call the shop, review services, or get directions to the Arlington location.

components.title: Baird Automotive shop details
paragraphs: Baird Automotive lists 3427 Washington Blvd., Arlington, VA 22201, weekday hours from 8:30am to 6:00pm, and key drop plus late pick-up availability.
The contact page also notes that the shop is within walking distance of the Virginia Square and Clarendon Metro stations.

metadata.description: Baird Automotive is one of Arlington's most established automotive repair shops, having served Northern Virginia and the surrounding areas for nearly two decades.

components.headline: Established Arlington auto repair with long local roots
components.subheadline: Baird Automotive presents itself as a professional, honest repair shop serving Northern Virginia drivers with diagnostics, maintenance, and long-term customer care.

components.alt: Front view of the Baird Automotive shop
components.caption: The original home page introduces the Arlington shop with this storefront image.

components.title: Welcome to Baird Automotive
components.lead: The home page centers on professionalism, respect, and honesty as the reason the shop has stayed established in Arlington for years.
paragraphs: Baird Automotive describes itself as one of Arlington's most established automotive repair shops, serving Northern Virginia and the surrounding area for two decades.
The site says the shop's success comes from treating customers with professionalism, respect, and honesty so relationships last instead of feeling transactional.

Joey Baird's philosophy is stated directly: he wants customers treated the way he would want to be treated, with enough maintenance education to reduce repair costs now and later and keep driving worry-free.

components.headline: Featured recognition from Washingtonian and Angie's List
components.body: The original home page points visitors to a Washingtonian Magazine PDF feature and to the shop's Angie's List award listing.

components.alt: Award and publication badges shown on the Baird Automotive home page
components.caption: The legacy site showcases magazine and recognition badges in a large centered image.

components.alt: Angie's List Super Service Award badge
components.caption: Baird Automotive highlights its Angie's List Super Service Award on the home page.

items.title: Hours of operation
items.body: Monday through Friday, 8:30am to 6:00pm, with key drop and late pick-up available.

items.title: Schedule an appointment
items.body: The site asks visitors to call (703) 527-1770 to book service.

items.title: Recommended links
items.body: The original sidebar calls out Al's Towing, Extreme Details, County Transmissions, Collision Specialists of Fairfax, and Redtop Cab.

items.title: Car care tip
items.body: The live site advises sunroof owners to clear drain tubes every fall so clogged tracks do not send water into expensive electrical modules.

components.headline: Recommended local automotive contacts
components.body: The live site repeatedly promotes a small set of nearby service partners and transportation options.

components.headline: More recommended links from the original site
components.body: These outbound links appear in the repeated sidebar modules throughout the legacy site.

components.headline: Transportation around the shop
components.body: Redtop Cab is also listed in the original recommended links block.

metadata.description: All about the Baird Automotive team and their many successes.

components.headline: Built on loyal customers and decades of shop experience
components.subheadline: The story page traces Baird Automotive from its 1992 opening through repeat recognition in regional publications and a team with more than 100 years of combined experience.

components.alt: The Baird Automotive team standing together
components.caption: The original story page introduces the team with this group photo.

components.title: How the shop tells its story
components.lead: Baird Automotive says it opened on August 3, 1992 and kept growing because loyal customers stayed with the shop as vehicle technology changed.
paragraphs: The live page says the business has adapted as automotive technologies evolved while keeping the same customer dedication it had on day one.

The shop highlights repeated recognition from Washington Consumers' CHECKBOOK Magazine in 1997, 2001, 2005, 2008, 2011, 2013, and 2015, with double check marks for price and quality and strong Northern Virginia scores.
The page also notes several Washingtonian Magazine appearances, most recently in May 2012, plus Angie's List Super Service Awards for 2008, 2009, and 2010.
A separate sidebar repeats Joey Baird's philosophy about treating people the way he would want to be treated and educating customers so future repair costs stay lower.

components.title: The team highlighted on the original page

items.title: Joey Baird
items.body: With 40 years of experience, Joey's biography covers an early 1955 Chevy build, Lincoln Technical Institute training, ASE Master Technician certification, GM training, emissions diagnosis, and yearly ongoing classes.

items.title: Carlton Powell
items.body: Carlton is listed with 24 years of experience, prior work at several Northern Virginia shops, and tenure at Baird Automotive dating back to 1997.

items.title: Daniel (Jesse) Smith
items.body: Jesse is credited with 27 years of experience, time teaching auto mechanics, work at local shops, ASE Master Technician status, and ongoing technical seminars since joining the shop in 2004.

items.title: Fred Swainson
items.body: Fred is presented with 33 years of experience spanning automotive sales, a rental car business, and the repair work he says he loves most after joining Baird Automotive in 2007.

components.title: Quick profile details preserved from the page

items.title: Shop opening date
items.body: August 3, 1992 is the milestone date used on the original story page.

items.title: Combined experience
items.body: The team is described as having more than 100 years of combined automotive experience.

items.title: Joey outside the shop
items.body: The live site also describes Joey as an Arlington native, avid triathlete, and off-road adventure racer.

components.alt: Better Business Bureau logo shown on the Our Story page
components.caption: The right rail of the original story page includes Better Business Bureau branding.

components.alt: Arlington Chamber of Commerce logo shown on the Our Story page
components.caption: The story page also includes Arlington Chamber of Commerce branding.

components.headline: Need service after reading the shop history?
components.body: The live site keeps steering visitors back toward practical next steps: services, appointments, and direct contact.

metadata.description: Description of services offered at Baird Automotive.

components.headline: Full-service repair for domestic, Asian, and European vehicles
components.subheadline: Baird Automotive says its technicians handle scheduled maintenance, repair work, performance problems, check engine lights, and electrical diagnostics for a broad mix of vehicles.

components.title: What the services page promises
components.lead: The page describes Baird Automotive as a full-service shop qualified for scheduled maintenance and repairs on most domestic, Asian, and European vehicles.
paragraphs: The live site emphasizes technicians who specialize in performance issues, including check engine lights and electrical diagnostics, while presenting the team as ready to help with whatever a driver needs.
The service pitch is split into three ideas: newer diagnostic technology, traditional service with customer education, and pride in getting the job done right the first time.

components.title: How the shop frames its approach

items.title: Modern technology
items.body: The technicians are described as trained in the newest technologies and supported by up-to-date diagnostic equipment.

items.title: Traditional service and professionalism
items.body: The shop says it takes time to educate customers about repairs and about how to maintain their cars now and in the future.

items.title: Experts who take pride in their work
items.body: Baird Automotive says it thrives on getting the job done right the first time and making customer satisfaction the highest priority.

components.alt: Small service image representing modern diagnostic technology
components.caption: One of three supporting service images on the original page.

components.alt: Small service image representing customer education and professionalism
components.caption: The original service page pairs this image with its traditional service message.

components.alt: Small service image representing expert repair work
components.caption: The third supporting image accompanies the shop's pride-in-work message.

items.title: Scheduled maintenance
items.body: The page lists extended warranty service, scheduled maintenance service, and oil and filter changes.

items.title: Brake, exhaust, and cooling work
items.body: Brake service, including ABS, plus exhaust systems and radiator service and replacement are all called out directly.

items.title: Comfort and drivability systems
items.body: Heating and air conditioning, steering and suspension, and transmission service are all listed.

items.title: Electrical and performance diagnosis
items.body: Check engine lights, electrical and electronic systems, engine repair, and starting and charging support are included.

items.title: Drivetrain services
items.body: Baird Automotive lists axle and driveshaft repair for RWD and 4WD vehicles, clutch repair, differential service, and four-wheel drive systems.

items.title: Tire services
items.body: Computerized alignment, tire balancing and rotation, and wheel mounting all appear on the page.

items.title: For customers
items.body: The amenities list includes discounted car rental rates, a comfortable waiting area, computerized repair records, key drop, Metro accessibility, and nearby restaurants and shopping.

components.alt: ASE certification logo shown on the Services page
components.caption: The right rail highlights ASE credentials on the original services page.

components.alt: Virginia emissions certified repair facility logo shown on the Services page
components.caption: The live site also shows Virginia emissions certification branding.

components.headline: Ready to schedule service?
components.body: The original page consistently funnels people toward direct contact and appointment scheduling by phone.

metadata.description: Community is important to the Baird Automotive team.

components.headline: Community support is part of the Baird Automotive identity
components.subheadline: The community page focuses on local schools, kids' programs, Arlington events, and endurance-sport sponsorships tied to Joey Baird and the shop.

components.title: How the page describes local involvement
components.lead: Baird Automotive says it gives back to the community that helped the shop become successful, with a focus on Arlington-area schools, youth programs, and events.
paragraphs: The live page specifically highlights support for Arlington's Little League Rookie Team, the Cardinals, and says the shop also backs annual Arlington events that help local businesses while bringing neighbors together.
It also presents Baird Automotive as an enthusiastic sponsor of EX2 Adventures, Team Z, and Potomac River Running for customers interested in racing, exercise, and outdoor events.

components.alt: Joey Baird with a bicycle on the In the Community page
components.caption: The original community page uses this photo alongside its sponsorship and event listings.

components.title: Community groups and programs named on the page

items.title: Events and sponsorships
items.body: Fight For the Cure for MS, EX2 Adventures, Tri Team Z, and Potomac River Running all appear in the first outbound-link section.

items.title: Local school programs
items.body: Arlington Little League Rookies, Arlington Science Focus School, Arlington Montessori House, Yorktown High School, and Washington Lee High School are all listed.

items.title: Weekly and annual events
items.body: Clarendon Flea Market and Farmer's Market, Taste of Arlington, Clarendon Mardi Gras Parade, and the CSC Invitational Bike Race are all called out.

items.title: Local links
items.body: The page closes with a Clarendon commuter link for local visitors.

components.headline: Events and sponsorship links from the original page
components.body: These outbound links are part of the live site's community roundup.

components.body: The live page also points to these Arlington-area activity groups.

components.headline: School and youth program links
components.body: The original site groups Arlington youth and school sponsorships into a separate section.

components.headline: More Arlington school sponsorships
components.body: Two more school links appear in the same sponsorship list.

components.headline: Annual Arlington event links
components.body: Taste of Arlington and the CSC Invitational bike race are both linked from the original page.

components.headline: Clarendon area links preserved from the source site
components.body: The original HTML includes one Clarendon commuter link and a separate Mardi Gras Parade link that was malformed in source markup.

components.headline: Find the shop in Arlington and get in touch directly
components.subheadline: The contact page centers on the Washington Boulevard address, weekday hours, Metro access, phone number, a protected email address, and a larger Google Maps link.

components.title: Contact details from the original page

items.question: How do I reach the shop?
When is the shop open?
items.answer: Monday through Friday, 8:30am to 6:00pm, with key drop and late pick-up available.

items.question: What nearby transit does the page mention?
items.answer: The page says the shop is within walking distance of the Virginia Square and Clarendon Metro stations.

components.title: Location notes preserved from the contact page
components.lead: The original contact page is simple: it gives the address, hours, phone number, email, and a Google Maps embed for the Arlington location.
paragraphs: The live site states that Baird Automotive is located in Arlington within walking distance of the Virginia Square and Clarendon Metro Stations.
A large embedded Google Map appears below the contact details, followed by a separate View Larger Map link that opens the same location in Google Maps.

components.headline: Call or map your route now
components.body: The source page emphasizes direct contact and map access over any form workflow.
